title: Enchanter Fix
description: Allows players to decorate their enchanting table setup by fixing the "enchantment power transmitter" block tag.
body:
![ Display the mod's title ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vNE5j3Te/images/17bc1ae2a5c11b9a2acfd60b6d1ea4eeb03fa28d.png)



# 🔮 About

Did you ever decorate your enchanting table, but once finished, you could no longer enchant at the maximum 30 levels? Not anymore!

**Enchanter Fix** allows players to place all types of vanilla blocks (decorative, solid, redstone, etc.) within their enchanting table setup without lowering the enchanting power. Build away!

As per tradition, it is still possible to reduce the level of enchanting by placing torches in the gap between the enchanting table and bookshelves.



## 🌐 Wiki

If you are looking for a wiki of sorts or just a more detailed walkthrough of the content of this mod, then you can find quick and easy introductions to all the added features of this project below.

If you find no answers to your questions here or want to suggest improvements for the project, then feel free to leave a comment on the CurseForge site ([here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enchanter-fix)).


<details>
<summary>Decoration Example</summary>

![ Display the example setup ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vNE5j3Te/images/9c1411d11ec7872cbf5a12950a17c530d5f1468b.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Supported Mods</summary>

The following mods should be natively supported. However, support for any of these mods may be broken at any time. If this is the case, feel free to comment on the CurseForge site to let me know!

- [Adorn](https://modrinth.com/mod/adorn)
- [Another Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture)
- [Blueprint](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint)
- [Woodworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/woodworks)
- [Create: Interiors](https://modrinth.com/mod/interiors)
- [Macaw's Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-furniture)
- [Valhelsia Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/valhelsia-furniture)

</details>


</details>



# 📬 Remarks  

Please keep in mind that at any given time vast amounts of the mod may be edited or completely overhauled! These changes should not, but may leave existing worlds on older versions corrupted. Creating backups before updating to a new version is advised!

I want to reiterate that this is simply a passion project. It may occur that for longer periods no updates or bug fixes are being developed/released simply because I do not want to.
